creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
For the X11=OFF case this affects a lot more of the port (e.g. I expect turning off Qt option XCB is needed). There is a branch with possibly-relevant changes in KDE-FreeBSD's Area51 repository, but it's missing a champion to push for an X11-less experience.

Closing this one as "the main issue is fixed and the other one is a long-term project".
